chunks.text: Host Your Recruiting Events in EECS - EECS at Berkeley Host Your Recruiting Events in EECS Info Sessions or Tech Talks CAP members have the exclusive privilege of hosting two recruiting events per academic year in Cory Hall and/or Soda Hall, such as info sessions, tech talks, and hack-a-thons. Companies will have the opportunity to build a partnership with student organizations by working closely with them to organize the recruiting events. They can assist with talk topics, flyer design, catering orders (additional fee to the vendor), marketing plan, swag orders, and other logistics. XRG will advertise recruiting events via email announcements and bulletin boards, department website and calendar, and TV monitors throughout our buildings. Tabling XRG can reserve the outdoor breezeway between Soda and Etcheverry Halls or the indoor Soda Hall lobby for up to three hours. One tabling event per semester is included for CAP members to promote their upcoming recruiting event. A table and chairs will be provided. Interviews XRG reserves rooms in the EECS buildings (Cory Hall and Soda Hall) for on-campus interviews. Per semester, members get up to two days with up to three interview rooms per day. Office Hours XRG reserves rooms in the EECS buildings (Cory Hall and Soda Hall) for CAP members’ office hours. Per semester, members get one room for half day use in conjunction with their recruiting event. Government/Non-Profit Exemptions Please reach out to jpgreene@berkeley.edu to learn more. Join CAP For more information, please contact: James Greene External Relations Coordinator External
